sightline_dm_scattering_budget.png.caption: Per-sightline dispersion and scattering budget (Figure~\ref{fig:budget}).
sightline_dm_scattering_budget.png.expectation: Two-panel budget figure: left DM stacks vs observed bars for 12 co-detections; right log-scattering panel with orange predicted-intervening circles and black diamond measured tau for citable-roster all-exp joint fits, x marks only when tau withheld.

galaxies_cgm.pdf.caption: Dominant intervening galaxies: mNFW CGM vs sightline impact (Figure~\ref{fig:galaxies_cgm}).
galaxies_cgm.pdf.expectation: Three panels (phineas, whitney, isha): hot mNFW DM vs impact parameter, 0.1 R_vir cap band, orange sightline marker, metadata box with b/R_vir class.

clusters_icm.pdf.caption: Foreground clusters of FRB 20230307A: mNFW baryon column vs impact (Figure~\ref{fig:clusters_icm}).
clusters_icm.pdf.expectation: Four cluster panels for phineas field; red/orange sightline markers; DM_cl annotated; outer clusters beyond R_vir show DM=0.
